title: Rendever
description: Rendever is a modpack for minecraft which aims to increase the performance as much as possible and provide an lag-free experience for everyone.
body:
[For newer versions of minecraft,please use the Plutonium instead of Rendever for now. Plutonium is more performant and stable compared to Rendever.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/op-mc)
![Rendever](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3de26326ab0b25939aa6f6ed60b960768ac33f4.jpeg)
# Rendever is the new optimization modpack that aims to bring a lag-free experience for everyone, even for people with a lower-end PC.

⚠️ [WARNING! Use Plutonium instead of Rendever for now. Click here to access Plutonium on modrinth!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/op-mc)
